name: sux-files
description: Registers the personal file-workspace MCP connector (/files/mcp): list/read/write/upload/share/delete over your Dropbox app folder (scope-is-the-wall — it can only see /Apps/<app>/), plus the raw `dropbox` escape hatch. Where blobs live (PDFs, images, exports) while the vault holds the note about them. Same Worker, same OAuth; a focused namespace kept separate from the universal `sux` connector. Needs DROPBOX_REFRESH_TOKEN; degrades to a clear not-configured message otherwise.
